arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia makes Anfield atmosphere admission and 'unfair' PSG dressing room claim after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has experienced the Anfield atmosphere previously and is confident PSG can overcome Liverpool in the UEFA Champions League last-16 second leg

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Liverpool vs PSG in the Champions League round of 16 on Tuesday night, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Slot: We will need more of the ball this time against PSG
arts.sum: Arne Slot believes that Liverpool will need to produce their best performance of the season if they are to beat Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League last-16 second leg at Anfield on Tuesday night. The Reds were indebted to the heroics of goalkeeper Alisson in that first-leg win last week with the Brazilian making nine saves - his personal record in a single match for Liverpool - as they survived an attacking onslaught from PSG before Harvey Elliott fired home an 87th-minute winner.

arts.ttl: Five Liverpool players are at risk of UEFA disciplinary action against Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: Liverpool take on PSG at Anfield for a place in the UEFA Champions League quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Tottenham Receive Boost as Juventus Willing to Sell PSG Target for Under £30M
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to move on from Randal Kolo Muani has created an opportunity for the club to pursue a new No. 9 to pair with Gonçalo Ramos this summer. One potential target is Juventus forward Dusan Vlahovic. According to a previous report from CaughtOffside, PSG planned to discuss the Serbian striker’s future last month. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Arne Slot provides Cody Gakpo injury update before PSG fixture
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot provides an update on Cody Gakpo's injury status ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash with Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs PSG: Champions League second leg times, how to watch on TV and stream in the U.S.
arts.sum: Liverpool are highly fortunate to be taking an advantage into the return leg of their Champions League tie with Paris Saint-Germain, after Harvey Elliott’s late goal gave the Premier League team victory in the first leg of the round of 16. Liverpool will host PSG in the Champions League’s last-16 second leg on Tuesday, March 11, 2025.

arts.ttl: When Liverpool can win Premier League title after Arsenal slip up against Man Utd
arts.sum: The title is unmistakably on its way to Anfield, but when will everything be decided.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news update: Who should Arne Slot sign in the summer window to replace Darwin Nunez?
arts.sum: Liverpool are likely to be in the market for an attacker in the summer transfer window amidst rumours that the likes of Darwin Nunez will leave the club.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot Drops Key Fixes Liverpool Must Make After PSG’s Relentless Pressing in First Leg
arts.sum: Liverpool have competed in arguably the best league in the world and faced top-tier opposition in the UEFA Champions League this season, including Real Madrid. However, manager Arne Slot appeared to take a subtle dig at those clubs with his latest remarks.
